description: Teamo v1 MVP - Replace old agent engine with cloud-based Claude Code instances. Users interact via Web UI, prompts route to per-user Claude CLI processes, responses stream back via SSE.

userStories.title: Instance Manager core API (create/prompt/status/destroy)
userStories.description: As a developer, I need the instance-manager service to manage per-user Claude CLI processes with full CRUD API.
acceptanceCriteria: POST /api/instance/create creates per-user Claude CLI process
POST /api/instance/prompt sends prompt and streams SSE response
GET /api/instance/status/{user_id} returns instance status
POST /api/instance/destroy/{user_id} terminates instance
GET /health returns service health
All 9 instance-manager tests pass
userStories.notes: Fully implemented. Subprocess spawning, PATH config, ANTHROPIC_API_KEY passthrough, .claude symlinks all working.

userStories.title: Claude Code Proxy - mode routing and SSE conversion
userStories.description: As a developer, I need the proxy to route claude_code mode to instance-manager and convert SSE events to frontend format.
acceptanceCriteria: mode=claude_code routes to instance-manager
mode=a2a (Research) routes to legacy backend
SSE events mapped: text→answer_chunk, thinking→think_chunk, tool_use→tool_call, tool_result→tool_result, done→task_done
start_answer event sent before streaming with step_conv_id
Auth extracted from Authorization header or Cookie
Tests pass (SSE conversion + auth tests)
userStories.notes: Core proxy working. 3 test failures are test setup issues (mock nesting), not code bugs. SSE format verified via curl and Playwright E2E.

userStories.title: Frontend ModeSelector component
userStories.description: As a user, I want to switch between Claude Code and Research modes via a visual selector below the input box.
acceptanceCriteria: ModeSelector.vue component created with Claude Code and Research cards
Default mode is claude_code
Mode persists in localStorage (chatMode key)
chatcore.js getModeValue() returns correct mode value
Component integrated in chat/index.vue and home/index.vue
Verify in browser: mode cards visible, clicking switches mode
userStories.notes: Component exists and integrated. E2E test confirms mode selector visible and Claude Code mode active.

userStories.title: Credits billing logic layer
userStories.description: As a developer, I need the billing calculation functions for daily credit deduction with priority-based deduction order.
acceptanceCriteria: deduct_credits() deducts 28 credits/day with priority: free→vip→extend
check_and_bill() checks balance before deduction, returns insufficient if < 28
get_credits_info() returns total, daily_cost, estimated_days, warning
All 11 credits-billing tests pass
userStories.notes: Pure billing logic implemented and tested. Missing: scheduler integration, MongoDB user queries.

userStories.title: Deploy to US server
userStories.description: As a developer, I need the instance-manager deployed to the US Silicon Valley server so Claude CLI can execute.
acceptanceCriteria: instance-manager running on 49.51.47.101:8902 via systemd
Claude CLI binary accessible at /root/.nvm/versions/node/v22.22.0/bin/claude
ANTHROPIC_API_KEY configured in systemd service
Service auto-restarts on failure
userStories.notes: Deployed via TAT. systemd service teamo-instance-manager active. Verified Claude CLI responds.

userStories.title: E2E: user sends 'hi', Claude responds, frontend renders
userStories.description: As a user, I want to type a message in the web UI and see Claude Code's response rendered in the chat.
acceptanceCriteria: Navigate to localhost:3000, select Claude Code mode
Type 'hi' in editor, click send
Page navigates to /chat/{id}
Claude response 'Hi! How can I help you today?' renders in chat bubble
Verify in browser: screenshot shows user message and Claude response
userStories.notes: Verified via Playwright. Screenshot saved as e2e-claude-code-hi-success.png. Full chain: browser→api-proxy→proxy(8901)→instance-manager(8902)→Claude CLI→SSE→frontend.

userStories.title: Fix proxy test failures
userStories.description: As a developer, I need all proxy tests to pass so CI stays green.
acceptanceCriteria: Fix TestModeRouting::test_claude_code_mode_routes_to_instance (response nesting issue)
Fix TestResearchModeRouting::test_a2a_mode_does_not_call_instance (AsyncMock setup)
Fix TestAutoCreate::test_ask_agents_creates_instance_if_needed (response nesting)
All 13 claude-code-proxy tests pass
pytest tests/ passes with 0 failures
userStories.notes: Fixed 3 test assertion mismatches: response nesting (data.result.mcp_task_id), mock setup (request vs post), removed wrong mock expectations. All 13/13 pass.

userStories.title: MongoDB conversation history persistence
userStories.description: As a user, I want my Claude Code conversations to be saved so I can see them when I return.
acceptanceCriteria: Proxy saves user prompt to MongoDB after askAgents call
Proxy saves Claude response (accumulated answer_chunks) after stream completes
Saved record includes: conv_id, session_group_id, username, query, response, mode='claude_code', request_time
Existing MongoDB connection from config.py used
Test verifies conversation saved after streaming
userStories.notes: Implemented app/history.py with motor. stream_check accumulates text chunks and calls save_conversation after streaming. 14/14 tests pass.

userStories.title: Daily billing scheduler
userStories.description: As a system, I need to automatically deduct credits daily for running instances.
acceptanceCriteria: APScheduler or equivalent runs daily at UTC 00:00
Queries MongoDB for all users with running instances
Calls deduct_credits() for each user
If balance < 28, calls instance-manager destroy API
Sends notification (log for MVP) when stopping instance
Scheduler starts with the proxy service
userStories.notes: Implemented app/scheduler.py with asyncio background task. Starts on FastAPI startup, runs daily at UTC 00:00. Priority deduction (free→vip→extend), auto-stop on insufficient balance. Test verifies deduction + stop logic. 15/15 tests pass.

userStories.title: Frontend instance status and credits polling
userStories.description: As a user, I want to see my instance status (running/stopped) and credits balance in the UI.
acceptanceCriteria: chat/index.vue calls apiGetInstanceStatus() on mount
Polls instance status every 30 seconds
Updates ModeSelector instanceStatus prop with real data
Calls apiGetCreditsInfo() and updates creditsInfo prop
Status dot shows correct color (green=running, yellow=creating, red=stopped)
Verify in browser: status dot and credits visible
userStories.notes: Added fetchInstanceStatus() with 30s interval polling in chat/index.vue. Updates instanceStatus and creditsInfo props. Frontend builds successfully. INTEGRATION.md updated.

userStories.title: Stop task functionality
userStories.description: As a user, I want to stop a running Claude Code task by clicking the stop button.
acceptanceCriteria: Frontend stop button triggers askAgentsUserStop API
Proxy forwards stop request to instance-manager destroy
Streaming SSE connection closes
Frontend shows task stopped state
User can send a new prompt after stopping
userStories.notes: Backend stop endpoint implemented. Frontend already has stop button wired to askAgentsUserStop.

userStories.title: Deploy proxy + billing updates to production
userStories.description: As a developer, I need the updated proxy (with MongoDB history + billing scheduler) deployed to the US server.
acceptanceCriteria: Updated claude-code-proxy deployed to 49.51.47.101
MongoDB connection configured on server
Billing scheduler running
Smoke test: send prompt, verify response + history saved
All services stable for 1 hour
userStories.notes: Blocked by US-008 and US-009. Cannot deploy until MongoDB history and billing scheduler are implemented.
